LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT THERESA ZABIT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT HAS PROVED SHE WAS NOT NEGLIGENT AND PLAINTIFF HAS RAISED NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT THAT ANY NEGLIGENCE OF DEFENDANT CAUSED THE ACCIDENT OR THAT DEFENDANT AFFIRMATIVELY CONTRIBUTED TO THE UNSAFE CONDITION. AS TO NEGLIGENCE, THERE IS NO EVIDENCE THAT THE MOTHER WAS THE EMPLOYER, OTHERWISE CONFIRMED. PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS WERE OVERRULED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G). DEFENDANT THERESA ZABIT'S MOTION TO BIRURCATE LIABILITY FROM DAMAGES AT TRIAL IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO RAISING THE ISSUE WITH THE JUDGE ASSIGNED FOR TRIAL. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS ANTHONY ZABIT, AND KARIN ZABIT'S JOINDER IN DEFENDANT THERESA ZABIT'S MOTION TO BIFURCATE LIABILITY FROM DAMAGES AT TRIAL IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO RAISING THE ISSUE WITH THE JUDGE ASSIGNED FOR TRIAL. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Birurcate Liability From Damages At Trial;
Off Calendar May-12-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES- ATTY. ROBERT S. AARON OF THE AARON & WILSON, LLP, TEL. NO. 438-7801 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. MATTHEW P. NOEL OF THE LEWIS BRISBOIS, BISGAARD & SMITH LLP, TEL. NO. 262-8575 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY THERESA ZABIT;
ATTY. LISA MAZUR OF THE JOSEPH COSTELLA & ASSOCIATES LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. (925) 945-4491 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS ANTHONY & KAREN ZABIT BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT THERESA ZABIT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT HAS PROVED SHE WAS NOT NEGLIGENT AND PLAINTIFF HAS RAISED NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT THAT ANY NEGLIGENCE OF DEFENDANT CAUSED THE ACCIDENT OR THAT DEFENDANT AFFIRMATIVELY CONTRIBUTED TO THE UNSAFE CONDITION. AS TO NEGLIGENCE, THERE IS NO EVIDENCE THAT THE MOTHER WAS THE EMPLOYER, OTHERWISE CONFIRMED. PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS WERE OVERRULED. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order pursuant to CCP 437 C(G). DEFENDANT THERESA ZABIT'S Motion To Birurcate Liability From Damages At Trial IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO RAISING THE ISSUE WITH THE JUDGE ASSIGNED FOR TRIAL. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB/ER
